title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 0–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kid, Big Mom as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't we just deal with the lightning one?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now let's see what you can do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kid must have his hands full...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom's in the castle now, but things could get dicey if she gets the cloud back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Stay, Straw hat-ya, I'm gonna take everyone else with me!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 27 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
